characters.appearance: Only hands are visible. Light complexion. Manicured nails featuring a mix of solid dark polish and silver/glittery designs.
characters.demeanor: Casual and engaged, demonstrating active use of the phone.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: यार, Supernova app के बारे में सुना है? [Man, have you heard about the Supernova app?]
Character A says: सब कहते हैं कि इसमें AI tutor के साथ कभी भी practice कर सकते हैं, तो मैंने try किया। [Everyone says you can practice anytime with its AI tutor, so I tried it.]
Character A says: और सच बताऊँ? English बोलना actually आसान लगने लगा है। [And to tell you the truth? Speaking English has actually started feeling easy.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by introducing the app casually, like a trusted recommendation from a friend.
- Highlights the core value proposition of practicing anywhere with an AI tutor.
- Establishes a relatable, low-pressure tone that makes English learning feel accessible.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
यार, Supernova app के बारे में सुना है? (Man, have you heard about the Supernova app?)
सब कहते हैं कि इसमें AI tutor के साथ कभी भी practice कर सकते हैं (Everyone says you can practice anytime with its AI tutor)
तो मैंने try किया 🤔 (so I tried it 🤔)
और सच बताऊँ? English बोलना actually आसान लगने लगा है (And to tell you the truth? Speaking English has actually started feeling easy)

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: दोस्तों से मिलने से पहले, बस स्टॉप पर या चलते-फिरते भी एक lesson कर लेती हूँ। [Before meeting friends, at the bus stop or even while walking, I complete a lesson.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the app's portability and convenience in real-world transit situations.
- Reinforces the idea of fitting English practice into small pockets of daily free time without disrupting the user's schedule.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
दोस्तों से मिलने से पहले (Before meeting friends)
बस स्टॉप पर या चलते-फिरते भी एक lesson कर लेती हूँ (at the bus stop or even while walking, I complete a lesson)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मेट्रो लेते वक़्त escalator पर भी practice हो जाती है। [I even practice on the escalator while taking the metro.]
Character A says: Time का पता ही नहीं चलता, और मज़ा भी बहुत आता है! [You don't even realize the time, and it's a lot of fun!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shows seamless integration of learning into a busy commute.
- Highlights the engaging, enjoyable nature of the app that makes time fly, removing the "chore" aspect of studying.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
मेट्रो लेते वक़्त escalator पर भी practice हो जाती है (I even practice on the escalator while taking the metro)
Time का पता ही नहीं चलता, और मज़ा भी बहुत आता है! 😄 (You don't even realize the time, and it's a lot of fun! 😄)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: बस जब भी free time मिला, मैंने practice की। [Just whenever I got free time, I practiced.]
Character A says: और आज मैंने 100 से ज़्यादा English sentences बोलना सीख लिया। [And today I learned to speak more than 100 English sentences.]
Character A says: आप भी Supernova try करके देखो! [You also try Supernova!]
Character A says: रात को सोते वक़्त वो confidence वाली feeling ही अलग होती है। [That feeling of confidence when going to sleep at night is just different.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the payoff: significant learning progress (100+ sentences) achieved effortlessly throughout the day.
- Ends with an emotional hook about feeling confident and accomplished at bedtime.
- Provides a warm, encouraging call to action to try the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
बस जब भी free time मिला, मैंने practice की (Just whenever I got free time, I practiced)
और आज मैंने 100 से ज़्यादा English sentences बोलना सीख लिया (And today I learned to speak more than 100 English sentences)
आप भी Supernova try करके देखो! (You also try Supernova!)
रात को सोते वक़्त वो confidence वाली feeling ही अलग होती है 🌝 (That feeling of confidence when going to sleep at night is just different 🌝)

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: English बोलने का confidence, Supernova के साथ। [The confidence to speak English, with Supernova.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Clear, static end card for brand recall.
- Provides a direct call to action to download the app from the app stores.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
English बोलने का confidence (The confidence to speak English)
Supernova
आज ही download करें और English बोलना शुरू करें (Download today and start speaking English)
App Store
Google Play
